methodology: Articles sourced from Virginia-specific RSS feeds and Google News RSS, filtered for AI/technology/workforce relevance, then assessed by Claude against the scenario framework. Each article is tagged with the region it most affects and the scenario it signals toward.

signals.title: New partnership between VCU and AI Ready RVA aims to boost AI education, innovation and community impact - VCU News
signals.signal_reading: VCU partnering with AI Ready RVA to build community-wide AI education signals intentional knowledge distribution infrastructure in Richmond, creating potential peer learning networks that could democratize deep capability beyond traditional tech sectors.

signals.title: ‘Shaping our future’: Company powering AI data centers invests $50+ million in Henrico, adding 200 jobs - WWBT
signals.signal_reading: A $50M data center infrastructure investment in Henrico adds 200 jobs but signals concentrated capital deployment in metro areas, deepening hardware capability in Richmond while other regions lack similar AI infrastructure anchors.

signals.title: EPA grant backs community-driven workforce training in Southwest Virginia - Virginia Tech News
signals.signal_reading: EPA-funded community-driven workforce training through Virginia Tech in Southwest Virginia demonstrates distributed capacity-building in an economically transitioning region, testing whether peer networks can overcome infrastructure deficits to build deep AI fluency.

signals.title: 6,000-acre innovation district launches in Manassas
signals.signal_reading: A 6,000-acre innovation district anchored by George Mason in Manassas reinforces NoVA's structural advantages in concentrating AI talent, capital, and institutional support—widening the capability gap unless explicit knowledge transfer mechanisms reach rural regions.

signals.title: Doug Hoven on How AI Is Changing the Way Homes Are Bought and Sold in Hampton Roads - The Ritz Herald
signals.signal_reading: AI tools transforming real estate transactions in Hampton Roads demonstrates platform-delivered shallow adoption spreading beyond tech hubs—showing distributed reach but not necessarily building local AI development capacity or deep technical fluency.
